lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: image-to-latent-boundary
summary: Explain why IMAGE and LATENT are not interchangeable, and identify VAE Encode/Decode as the standard boundary.
use_when: The user asks whether an image node can accept latents or why an IMAGE output cannot connect to a LATENT input.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: change-image-socket-to-latent
summary: Give the safe code-level checklist for changing INPUT_TYPES and RETURN_TYPES from IMAGE to LATENT.
use_when: The user wants to modify a custom node from IMAGE input to LATENT input.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: latent-dict-samples-shape
summary: Explain LATENT as a dict with samples [B,C,H,W] and why the old image code must change.
use_when: The user asks what latent objects contain or gets errors indexing latents like images.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: image-tensor-channel-order
summary: Explain IMAGE as [B,H,W,C] and how that differs from common PyTorch channel-first expectations.
use_when: The user sees shape errors when using torch or OpenCV operations on ComfyUI IMAGE tensors.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: mask-shape-normalization
summary: Explain MASK shapes, alpha-derived masks, and when to unsqueeze/broadcast for image or latent operations.
use_when: The user has mask shape mismatch errors or mask/image/latent mixing problems.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: conditioning-is-not-a-tensor
summary: Warn that CONDITIONING, MODEL, CLIP, and VAE are pipeline objects, not generic tensors to mutate blindly.
use_when: The user wants to inspect or directly edit conditioning/model objects.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: vae-boundary-decision
summary: Decide whether a workflow should use VAE Encode/Decode nodes or keep processing in the current space.
use_when: The user asks whether to process before or after sampling/decode.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: multitype-input-design
summary: Explain V3 MultiType/MatchType or separate explicit typed inputs for nodes that accept several data types.
use_when: The user wants one node socket to accept IMAGE or MASK or LATENT.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: lazy-router-datatype-patterns
summary: Use lazy evaluation for router/switch nodes so unused heavy branches are not evaluated.
use_when: The user wants a workflow switch, router, bypass, or master control panel.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: socket-change-failure-signatures
summary: Diagnose errors caused by changing socket types without changing function internals.
use_when: The user reports red nodes, connection failures, key errors, shape errors, or tensor dimension errors after editing a node.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: build-new-node-vs-mutating-old-node
summary: Recommend creating a new node when changing socket contracts would break existing workflows.
use_when: The user wants to modify an existing node used in old workflow JSON.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.

lane_title: ComfyUI Datatype Conversion and Boundary Design
title: latent-edit-risk-levels
summary: Classify latent edits as high-risk unless they preserve shape and understand sampler/model stage.
use_when: The user wants to manipulate latent samples directly for creative or performance reasons.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview, source anchors, and code examples together. Preserve tensor shapes exactly.
